title: 54 - At the Theater
description: دو دوست بعد از دیدن یک نمایش در تئاتر حرف می‌زنند.

sentences.text: How was the show at the theater?
It was terrible! I did not like it.
Really? Why?
The story did not feel real. It was silly.
sentences.translation: داستان واقعی به نظر نمی‌رسید. مسخره بود.

sentences.text: How were the stage and the actors?
The main actor was too loud.
sentences.translation: بازیگر اصلی خیلی بلند حرف می‌زد.

sentences.text: Was the audience happy?
No, and we sat in a bad row.
sentences.translation: نه، و ما در یک ردیف بد نشستیم.

sentences.text: What about the singer?
The singer had a weak voice.
Did the last scene end well?
No, the end was not good.
Did you talk about it after the show?
sentences.translation: بعد از نمایش درباره‌اش صحبت کردی؟

sentences.text: Yes, our group talked outside.
sentences.translation: بله، گروه ما بیرون صحبت کرد.

sentences.text: Did you take a video?
Yes, a short video on my phone.
sentences.translation: بله، یک ویدیوی کوتاه با گوشی‌ام.

sentences.text: Well, the costumes looked nice.
True. Next time let's see a better play, maybe a comedy.
sentences.translation: درست است. دفعه بعد یک نمایش بهتر ببینیم، شاید یک کمدی.

sentences.text: Good idea. Let's go with our group of friends to a nice theater.
sentences.translation: فکر خوبیه. بیا با گروه دوستانمان به یک تئاتر خوب برویم.

sentences.text: Perfect. That will be fun.
